news.title: State Championship Bound!
news.description: After a grueling series of matches, Pegasus Prime has secured a spot in the State Championships with a first-place finish.

news.title: Nexus Library v2.0 Released
news.description: Our custom motion control library now supports multi-threaded sensor fusion for even greater autonomous precision.

news.title: STEM Outreach Workshop
news.description: We hosted a robotics workshop for local middle schoolers, introducing them to the world of VEX and engineering.
